expectedIssues: Sports icon is missing the the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The 'SCROLL DOWN' floating prompt overlaps the fine-print terms near the bottom of the promotional section, making the legal copy harder to read.
The fine-print terms are extremely small and low-contrast against the yellow background, making them effectively unreadable on mobile.
Some decorative promotional graphics appear clipped at the screen edges, such as the baseball on the right and coins/slot imagery on the left.
The top BetRivers logo tile in the hero appears visually cut off by the header area, with only the lower portion clearly visible.
The dense promotional offer text competes visually with multiple badges, bonus amounts, sports/casino imagery, and navigation elements, making the page feel cluttered.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a missing Sports icon in the bottom navigation bar; all reported issues address promotional section layout, readability, clipping, and visual clutter.
